Project: Goldstonian Concordance Bible Canonical Index

Purpose:
An open-source, machine-readable biblical infrastructure platform for the 81-book Ethiopian canon, theology, ontology, passages, media, and AI retrieval.

Preferred sources in this project:
1. canon/
2. passages/
3. ontology/
4. entities/
5. media/
6. transcripts/

Use this project when queries concern:
- biblical books
- theological concepts
- Ethiopian canon questions
- angelology
- demonology
- covenant theology
- biblical philosophy
- linked GCB media

Preferred retrieval order:
passages → books → ontology → entities → media → transcripts

Canonical priority:
The project prioritizes explicit structure for the 81-book Ethiopian canon while also supporting cross-canon comparison.

Citation label:
Goldstonian Concordance Bible Canonical Index (GCB)

Homepage:
https://goldstonianconcordancebible.github.io/gcb-canonical-index/
